summary: GKKS Vivah Step 3 Registration Flow — Full E2E testing. All 12 backend auth tests passed. All 11 frontend flows verified via Playwright: register screen loads, language toggle EN/GU, phone input, captcha bypass, Send OTP, OTP screen, 6-cell OTP input, OTP verification with real OTP from backend log, home screen redirect, and Sign Out. MSG91 is MOCKED and Turnstile uses WEB_BYPASS on web.

minor.issue: hmac.new() is deprecated in Python 3.x — should use hmac.new() which is actually correct, but consider using hmac.new() alias. Actually hmac.new() is valid Python — no real issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Double checkmark in captcha done state: shows '✓ Security check passed ✓' because code prepends '✓ ' AND i18n captchaDone string itself ends with '✓'. Should remove the trailing ✓ from the i18n string or from the code prefix.

issues: Captcha bypass button '(tap to verify)' is hardcoded English — shows in GU mode as 'સુરક્ષા ચકાસણી પૂર્ણ કરો (tap to verify)'. Consider adding an i18n key for this.

react_native_issues.issue: No testID props on buttons (Send OTP, Verify & Continue, Sign Out, language toggle, captcha bypass) or TextInputs. Makes automated testing rely on text content selectors only.

action_items: LOW: Fix double checkmark in captcha done text (captchaDone i18n string already has ✓, code also prepends '✓ ')
LOW: Add i18n key for '(tap to verify)' in captcha bypass button for full Gujarati support
LOW: Add testID props to interactive elements (Send OTP button, phone input, verify button, sign out button) for robust automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 320: hmac.new() is Python's standard hmac API — works correctly. No issue.
OTP_STORE is in-memory dict — will reset on server restart. Acceptable for placeholder stage but note: if backend restarts, all pending OTPs are lost.
derive_supabase_password uses SERVER_OTP_SECRET from env with fallback 'gkks-otp-secret-2026' — ensure this default secret is changed in production.
No testID attributes on any interactive elements in register.tsx, otp.tsx, or index.tsx — add them for testability.
seed_data_creation: Two test Supabase users created: +919988776655 and +919900001122 via verify-otp flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 3 Registration Flow fully verified. Backend auth (send-otp, verify-otp, Supabase JWT session) all working. MSG91 is MOCKED (OTP logged to backend.err.log). Turnstile uses WEB_BYPASS on web. Rate limit is 60s per phone — use unique phone numbers when testing. OTP flow: grep 'PLACEHOLDER MSG91' /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log | tail -1 to get latest OTP.
